core_mechanism: record statistics of a sequence of independent random variables under a slowly drifting distribution mean, with the first-order shift in record-occurrence rate given by a linear-response relation proportional to the drift-velocity-to-noise (standard-deviation) ratio
brief_reason: The abstract analyzes records drawn from independent random variables with a drifting mean and derives that the leading-order change in the record rate is proportional to the ratio of the drift velocity to the underlying standard deviation.
